stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 6, what is a destination alternate aerodrome? It is an aerodrome to which a flight may proceed when…

options.a: It becomes inadvisable to land at the aerodrome of intended landing.
options.b: The destination weather is below minima before departure.
options.c: The aircraft has insufficient fuel to reach the destination.
options.d: ATC requests a diversion due to traffic congestion.
